implementedControls: Access and refresh token jti claims
Refresh-token family revocation on reuse/expiry anomalies
Account failed-login lockout fields and logic
Audit log table and auth/leave audit events
remainingRisks: MFA enrollment and challenge enforcement are not implemented yet.
SSO/OAuth provider integration is not implemented yet.
Secrets are still provided through environment variables, not an external vault.
No automated DAST, fuzzing, or penetration suite exists yet.
AI model results are compatible but not yet backed by persistent embeddings and calibrated model telemetry.
